iCloud Activation Lock

The only completely free and reliable iCloud activation lock removal service for your Apple devices fixes Locked to Owner, Activation Lock and iCloud Lock issues in minutes.

SIM not Supported and Carrier Lock

Use any SIM card on your iPhone or iPad with this Unlocker, if you see an error message saying "SIM not supported", "no network", or any other issue this app can help.​

Learn more

Blacklist or Bad ESNX

Remove restrictions on your iPhone, iPad or Apple Watch if it has been blacklisted or has a bad ESN. Our Unblacklist Tool can permanently remove these restrictions.

We offer Factory iCloud Removal Services and iPhone & iPad Blacklist/Bad ESN Removals that are permanent ​

This means you can delete the old iCloud ID from your device. After we do this, you will have a new iCloud address and use your phone as if it was brand new. This is an iCloud
Unlock Service where we will remotely remove icloud activation lock from your iPhone, iPad or Apple Watch.

Activation Lock

Unlock your iPhone, iPad or Apple Watch from the Comfort of your Browser​

Got an iCloud Activation Locked iPhone, iPad, or Apple Watch? Everyone gets how annoying that feels, especially when you’re dying to use that device for something crucial. Enter UnlockMaker.com! Our Online Service delivers for anyone wanting their gadget free from that tricky iCloud ​

Does UnlockMaker’s iCloud Unlock work on my specific device?​

Our Unlock is compatible with any iPhone, iPad or Apple Watch and any iOS version. Even if you have an older model, we can help! We offer unlocking services for all models of iPhone, as well as for any other model with an active iCloud Lock

What our user’s say about us

Nolan
★★★★★
I was really struggling with my iPhone because it was locked to the previous owner and I couldn't use it at all. But then I found UnlockMaker and it was a total life saver! Within minutes I was able to remove the iCloud lock and get my phone working again. Thank you so much for this amazing tool!​
Sophie S
★★★★★
I had an iPhone 14 that was locked and had been sitting in a drawer for two years after I accidentally locked it and lost the receipt. These guys managed to unlock it for me! Their service was incredible, and I couldn't be happier. Highly recommend them. 10/10!
Nolan
★★★★★
I had an old iPhone that I wanted to give to my nephew but it was locked to the owner screen. I wasn't sure if it was even possible to fix, but unlockmake was able to easily remove the iCloud activation lock for me. Thank you so much!
